name: Rural Automation
description: The foundation of all agricultural robotics and sequential control logic.

programming.name: Programming
programming.description: Unlock logic controls and software development capabilities.

movement.name: Movement
movement.description: Basic navigation instructions: moveNorth, moveSouth, moveEast, moveWest.

farmingActions.name: Farming Actions
farmingActions.description: Fundamental agrarian commands: till(), plant(), and harvest().

loops.name: Loops
loops.description: Unlock loops structure to repeat instructions autonomously.

forLoops.name: For Loops
forLoops.description: Execute a block of code a set number of times using for-loops.

whileLoops.name: While Loops
whileLoops.description: Execute code continuously while a condition remains true.

variables.name: Variables
variables.description: Store and recall states in named memory variables.

basicVariables.name: Basic Variables
basicVariables.description: Store and recall states in named memory variables.

advancedVariables.name: Advanced Variables
advancedVariables.description: Store and recall states in named memory variables.

ifStatements.name: If Statements
ifStatements.description: Introduce conditional logic and decision-making filters.

sensors.name: Sensors
sensors.description: Detect crop growth stages, ground types, and moisture levels.

functions.name: Functions
functions.description: Write custom, parameterized, and reusable blocks of code.

arrays.name: Arrays
arrays.description: Organize ordered collections of coordinates or inventory data.

objects.name: Objects
objects.description: Map key-value properties to group related parameters.

events.name: Events
events.description: Trigger automated drone scripts based on real-time grid changes.

efficiency.name: Efficiency
efficiency.description: Calibrate systems to decrease battery drain and boost speed.

batteryTech.name: Battery Tech
batteryTech.description: Re-engineered energy grid: increase maximum drone battery capacity.

fasterMovement.name: Faster Movement
fasterMovement.description: Calibrate thruster outputs for faster grid navigation.

energyEfficiency.name: Energy Efficiency
energyEfficiency.description: Highly optimized actuators: reduce action energy requirements.

advancedEfficiency.name: Advanced Efficiency
advancedEfficiency.description: State-of-the-art power distribution and recharge rates.

expansion.name: Expansion
expansion.description: Expand the boundaries of your operations and resource reserves.

largerBattery.name: Larger Battery
largerBattery.description: Enlarge drone energy reserve tank size.

expansion4x4.name: 4x4 Expansion
expansion4x4.description: Clear debris and expand the active farming field to a 4x4 grid.

expansion5x5.name: 5x5 Expansion
expansion5x5.description: Bridge the stream to secure a larger 5x5 farming layout.

expansion6x6.name: 6x6 Expansion
expansion6x6.description: Maximum grid layout: optimize all 36 farming sectors.

farming.name: Farming
farming.description: Unlock advanced seed varieties and organic crops.

wheat.name: Wheat
wheat.description: Basic wheat crops: easy to cultivate, stable yield.

carrot.name: Carrot
carrot.description: Nutrient-rich root crop yielding moderate XP.

beetroot.name: Beetroot
beetroot.description: Sweet beetroots: required for advanced energy extraction.

potato.name: Potato
potato.description: Grow potato tubers with a high XP payout.

watermelon.name: Watermelon
watermelon.description: Elite melon blocks with substantial XP and energy value.

automation.name: Automation
automation.description: Master advanced automated grid operations and roles.

taskScheduler.name: Task Scheduler
taskScheduler.description: Queue autonomous commands with delays and priorities.

sharedStorage.name: Shared Storage
sharedStorage.description: Drones can interact with a central barn to store/retrieve resources.

droneRoles.name: Drone Roles
droneRoles.description: Assign custom operational roles and behaviors to your drone array.

multiDroneControl.name: Multi Drone Control
multiDroneControl.description: Deploy and coordinate multiple drones concurrently.
